A brick,

Kiln-fired clay, rotated under museum lighting, priced like it matters. Scroll to turn it in your hand.

The Object / Spec Sheet

Nothing has ever been engineered this hard to remain a brick.

Every FIRED° begins as raw clay, hand-selected from a single undisclosed quarry by a technician trained exclusively in rectangular objects. It is aged, pressed, and fired at 1,000°C for thirty-six hours — considerably longer than necessary, which is rather the point.

The result is inspected, numbered, and rotated once under gallery lighting before it ever meets a wall it will, in all likelihood, never be asked to build.

Technical SpecificationRev. 04
Weight2.3 kg
Dimensions215 × 102.5 × 65 mm
MaterialKiln-fired clay
Firing temp1,000°C / 36 hrs
Compressive strength20 N/mm²
Finish options03
Edition000001 / 999
OriginSingle quarry, undisclosed
Provenance

Every brick has a story. This one has a publicist.

— Founder's Letter, FIRED° Atelier

FIRED°
FIRED° is a concept storefront built to show what happens when ordinary branding is taken too seriously. No bricks are shipped. No data leaves your browser. All 999 editions are, regrettably, imaginary.
